name: Tetris
description: Falling-block puzzle series built around arranging tetrominoes into complete lines.

eras.title: Classic Puzzle Era
eras.description: The core Tetris formula becomes one of the most important puzzle game designs in the medium.

eras.title: Modern Variants Era
eras.description: Later entries reinterpret the formula through online play, audiovisual presentation, and competitive variants.
